summary: Subscription Paywall/Gating System Testing - All tests passed. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified working including pricing page, upgrade gates, and admin bypass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription paywall/gating system fully tested. Three tiers: Starter ($0), Professional ($49), Enterprise ($199). Feature gates working correctly - free users see UpgradeGate component with lock icon, plan name, price, and 'Upgrade Now' button linking to /pricing. Admin users bypass all gates. Backend returns 403 with structured upgrade_required error for gated endpoints.

subscription_plans.test_plans_have_features_list: PASS - All plans have features array

feature_map.test_free_user_all_features_denied: PASS - Free user gets allowed=false for all features
feature_map.test_admin_all_features_allowed: PASS - Admin gets allowed=true for all features (bypass)

feature_access.test_feature_access_ai_intelligence_deni: PASS - ai_intelligence_hub returns allowed=false for free user

notary_user_gating.test_notary_gated_on_ai_intelligence: PASS - Notary user (non-admin) is gated on enterprise features
notary_user_gating.test_notary_gated_on_escrow: PASS - Notary user is gated on escrow

upgrade_error_structure.test_upgrade_error_has_all_required_fiel: PASS - 403 response contains: error, message, required_plan, required_plan_name, required_plan_price, current_plan, feature

pricing_page.subscribe_buttons: PASS - Subscribe buttons present for paid plans

admin_bypass.ai_intelligence_accessible: PASS - Admin sees full AI Intelligence Hub page (not gated)
admin_bypass.all_tabs_visible: PASS - Risk Scoring, Summarizer, Notary Match, Fraud Dashboard, Voice Auth tabs visible
admin_bypass.interactive_elements: PASS - Form inputs and Analyze Risk button present

features_verified.backend_admin_bypass: PASS - Admin user gets allowed=true for all features
features_verified.backend_free_user_denied: PASS - Free user gets allowed=false for all features

features_verified.backend_escrow_gated: PASS - POST /api/escrow/create returns 403 for free user
features_verified.backend_anan_gated: PASS - POST /api/anan/ceremony/start returns 403 for free user
features_verified.backend_hts_gated: PASS - POST /api/hts/tokenize returns 403 for free user
features_verified.backend_upgrade_error_structure: PASS - 403 responses include upgrade_required error with plan details
features_verified.frontend_pricing_page: PASS - Shows 3 plan cards with correct prices
features_verified.frontend_upgrade_gate_ai: PASS - Free user sees upgrade gate on /ai-intelligence
features_verified.frontend_upgrade_gate_escrow: PASS - Free user sees upgrade gate on /escrow
